title: 3D Printed Face Shield with Closed Top
author: Julia Rossmanith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bek6jcze
materials: overhead transparency or laminated laminating foil

steps.title: Print head part
steps.instruction: Print the head part of the face shield with the 3D printer. Visera_Fija_Cerrada_v0.4_con_autolock.stl

steps.title: Attach transparency/foil
steps.instruction: Place the overhead transparency or laminated laminating foil on the head part.

steps.title: Add strap
steps.instruction: Put a strap through both ends of the head part of the shield to fix it on your head.
